name: Conversational Loop Core
implemented: voiceStore rewritten as single loop orchestrator (ready->listening->thinking->speaking->ready|relisten)
reply speech WIRED (sendMessage returns reply; orchestrator speaks it) — Kiaros speaks for the first time
duplicate-submission bug killed (effect-based path removed; exactly-once submission in recognition callback)
exactly-once listen-cycle conclusion (onerror+onend double-fire guard; fixes InvalidStateError double-start)
conversation mode: hands-free auto-relisten, bounded silent relistens (2), persisted setting + UI toggle
echo protection: never-listen-while-speaking, settle delay, containment + 80% token overlap + 7s exact-match window for short replies
barge-in: mic press during speech stops TTS and listens
SpeechSynthesisService rewritten: sentence chunking, resume keepalive, per-session callbacks, benign interrupted/canceled, per-chunk watchdog, voiceschanged
honest degraded mode: template ResponseGenerator DELETED; responseSource 'llm'|'degraded'
StrictMode-safe init; interval leak fixed; thinking cannot stick

verification.degraded_mode: honest replies for unconfigured and provider-down
